# .github

This directory contains GitHub-specific automation and metadata (workflows, templates, Dependabot, and bot instructions).

## Agent Skills Pointer

Reusable coding-agent skills for this repository live in [`skills/`](../skills).

- Skill definitions: [`skills/*/SKILL.md`](../skills)
- Claude discovery and invocation rules: [`CLAUDE.md`](../CLAUDE.md)
- Current Gardens skills: `query-subgraph`, `read-contracts`, `write-contract`
